label: About
title: About Mist Seed Listening Field
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 15 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around THE MINI FOREST - Rewilding using the Miyawaki Method and Angel, by Cerys Hafana, plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Mist Seed Listening Field: Create a square, full-bleed still image of a mist-lit rewilded listening habitat, dense enough to feel enclosed but porous with narrow clearings. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central luminous brush-veil glyph, upper torn pale disc, and left hanging paper marker.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
